enforcement_checks.failure_condition: product or generated truth surfaces retain milestone residue or forbidden annotations
synthetic fixture rules or generated truth path coverage drift from the classification contract
genuine generated outputs lack shared authenticity envelopes or replay instructions
replay ll or replay manifest fixtures are unlabeled or drift from the explicit synthetic fixture contract

fail_closed_conditions: generated truth files listed by policy must reach zero milestone residue hits
genuine generated outputs under tmp/reports or tmp/artifacts must carry the shared authenticity schema and replayable provenance
replay ll and replay manifest fixtures under tests/tooling/fixtures/objc3c/**/replay_run_* must stay explicitly labeled as synthetic_fixture
archive-only roots may preserve planning history but must not be treated as product or generated truth surfaces
notes: d001 defines the stable contract only; d002 is responsible for the live audit implementation and runner integration
archive-boundary compatibility is intentionally split into d003 so historical references can be preserved without weakening the main proof-hygiene gate
